name: Raspberry Streusel Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 1 1/2 cups flour, baking powder, and sugar. Make a well in the center.
2. In another bowl, whisk together egg, milk, and melted butter. Add to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined. Gently fold in the raspberries. Pour into prepared muffin pans, filling each about two-thirds full.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining 1/4 cup flour, 2 tablespoons butter, pecans, and brown sugar. Sprinkle over the muffins.
4. Bake at 375°F for 20 to 25 minutes. Remove from the pans immediately.
